emails.subject: The Chairman's Reward
emails.body: Despite my veto eBiz decided to publish something on California energy prices. I think Palmer overrulled me. He said that the article was harmless but I still think it is stupid for us to be writing articles about this. John Forwarded by John J Lavorato/Corp/Enron on 12/17/2000 10:13 AM From: eBiz on 12/15/2000 06:33 PM Sent by: Enron Announcements

emails.subject: Re: The Chairman's Reward
emails.body: Re: The Chairman's Reward it is his job to talk. he can't help himself.
